author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Shipped Option A fix: build_agent_command() takes a new claude_config_dir parameter that is prepended as a shell prefix assignment (CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR='/path' env -u CLAUDECODE claude ...) before the env call. Callers launch_local and plan.rs both read std::env::var at invocation time. 4 new tests in kickoff::tests cover propagation, empty-string-skip, single-quote shell escaping, and sandbox interaction. All 4 existing build_agent_command tests updated to pass None. 139/139 kickoff tests pass, cargo fmt clean, no new clippy warnings in touched files.
